narrative:
Eagle Twp township has 843 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.8 percentage points.
